modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to reset voucher generation date in MBM for faculty activity.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to edit the faculty activity information in MBM, but it is locked. I also need to re-print vouchers or enclosures. The voucher generation date needs to be reset so I can do this.
short_description: Need to reset voucher generation date in MBM for faculty activity.
description: I am trying to edit the faculty activity information in MBM, but it is locked. I also need to re-print vouchers or enclosures. The voucher generation date needs to be reset so I can do this.
